// Code generated by simplemock. DO NOT EDIT.
package main

import (
	"io"
)

func _[T io.Reader]() { var _ Wrapper[T] = &WrapperMock[T]{} }

type WrapperMock[T io.Reader] struct {
	WrapFunc func() T
}

func (m *WrapperMock[T]) Wrap() T {
	if m.WrapFunc != nil {
		return m.WrapFunc()
	}
	panic("Wrap called with nil WrapFunc!")
}
